signals.headline: Strait of Hormuz Reopened Amid Iran War De-escalation | NO (war not over) | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Strait of Hormuz Reopened Amid Iran War De-escalation | NO (war not over) | HIGH confidence**  
President Trump and Iran announced on April 17, 2026, that the Strait of Hormuz is "completely open" for full passage due to an Israel-Lebanon ceasefire, though the US naval blockade on Iranian shipping persists pending broader negotiations[5]. Trump stated the war is proceeding "swimmingly" and project
